explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Documentation details an AI system's customization for tailored safeguards. It also describes the AI system's role in proactive risk reduction through pattern recognition insights.

relevant_sources.summary: This company-owned blog post provides evidence for **governance** and **transparency**. It supports governance by detailing the AI system's customization for tailored safeguards and its role in proactive risk reduction through pattern recognition insights. Transparency is demonstrated by describing the AI tool's integration, the specific hazard categories it monitors, and its accuracy rates, all of which contribute to understanding its use case and operational oversight via real-time alerts.
relevant_sources.title: Kiewit T-Pulse AI Safety Pilot (Newsroom Article)

oversight.findings: Documentation describes an AI tool's operational oversight, which includes real-time alerts.

relevant_sources.summary: This company-owned blog post provides evidence for **governance** and **transparency**. It supports governance by detailing the AI system's customization for tailored safeguards and its role in proactive risk reduction through pattern recognition insights. Transparency is demonstrated by describing the AI tool's integration, the specific hazard categories it monitors, and its accuracy rates, all of which contribute to understanding its use case and operational oversight via real-time alerts.
relevant_sources.title: Kiewit T-Pulse AI Safety Pilot (Newsroom Article)

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: The company describes the integration, monitored hazard categories, accuracy rates, use case, and operational oversight via real-time alerts for an AI tool. It also identifies specific AI tools, KADE and ADAPT, outlining their capabilities and impact, including creating daily plans and improving performance through data.

relevant_sources.summary: This company-owned blog post provides evidence for **governance** and **transparency**. It supports governance by detailing the AI system's customization for tailored safeguards and its role in proactive risk reduction through pattern recognition insights. Transparency is demonstrated by describing the AI tool's integration, the specific hazard categories it monitors, and its accuracy rates, all of which contribute to understanding its use case and operational oversight via real-time alerts.
relevant_sources.title: Kiewit T-Pulse AI Safety Pilot (Newsroom Article)

relevant_sources.summary: This corporate technology page provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar of responsible AI. It identifies specific AI tools, KADE and ADAPT, and describes their capabilities and impact, such as creating daily plans and improving performance through data. While it details what the AI tools do, it does not provide information on their execution or underlying policies.
relevant_sources.title: Kiewit Technology Page - KADE and ADAPT AI Tools

summary.overall_findings: Peter Kiewit Sons' public disclosures address transparency and governance, with materials describing the integration of an AI tool and detailing an AI system's customization for tailored safeguards. These practices, along with documented operational oversight via real-time alerts for an AI tool, contribute to evidence for 3 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. The assessment draws on 3 publicly available sources. No qualifying public evidence was found for fairness, explainability, and 2 additional pillars.
